body:
yukiii-crashingout:

In Another Life

Original content

CW: Sapphic/wlw yearning


In another life, we would be married  

In another life, our parents would smile and congratulate us 

In another life… 

But 

I don’t want this to be another life. 

I want this to be now 

I want this to be true. 

I want you.
